block1.line3: Each wave opened a window — and closed right after.
block1.line4: Did you get in early, or arrive when it was already saturated?

block2.line1: Today, two platforms control a market worth billions.
block2.line3: 49% of visits still come from just 5 countries.
block2.line4: The rest of the world has barely discovered this.

block3.line2: be one more trader trying to call the next prediction —
block3.line3: or build the house where everyone else plays.

social.eyebrow: IS IT POSSIBLE TO PREDICT THE FUTURE?
social.title: Prediction Market
social.subtitle: It works like a stock exchange, but for future events. People trade with real money on outcomes like "Who wins the election?" or "Does Bitcoin go above $100k?" Because real money is at stake, forecasts become surprisingly accurate, often outperforming polls or experts. Governments, companies, and investors already use this data to make decisions before the facts unfold.

problems.title: You have an audience. You just can't make it pay.
problems.subtitle: Ads pay pennies. Sponsors are unpredictable. Courses take months to build. Meanwhile your audience argues, predicts, debates every day — and none of that energy earns you a cent.

cards.title: Every revenue model you know already has a hard ceiling
cards.copy: Ads pay per click. Sponsors pay per post. A prediction market earns a fee on every single trade — 24/7, with no effort from you after launch.

cards.title: Your audience already predicts — you just don't own it
cards.copy: They debate outcomes in your comments, in your DMs, in your community. Kuest turns that energy into a market where every trade pays you.

cards.title: You don't need to understand prediction markets to launch one
cards.copy: No trading knowledge. No crypto background. No dev team. Just your niche, your questions, and 15 minutes to go live.

solution.title:
A billion-dollar market. Concentrated in two companies. Until now.
Polymarket and Kalshi dominate — but they are closed. You trade on them. Not with them.
solution.subtitle:
Kuest was built to change that.
In just a few clicks, you launch your own prediction market site: with your brand, your categories, and your custom markets. We handle the smart contracts, infrastructure, liquidity, and integrations. You focus on your audience — and collect fees from every trade that happens on your site.
No code. No server. No technical headaches.
solution.cta: I want to be the house

points.title: Pick your niche and write your questions
points.copy: Sports, crypto, politics, memes — anything your audience already argues about. You set the questions, the fee rate, and your brand.

points.title: Go live — we handle the infrastructure
points.copy: Settlement, wallets, liquidity, blockchain — all running before you finish setup. Your market is live in under 15 minutes with no code.

points.title: Every trade pays you directly
points.copy: Your audience bets. The fee goes straight to your wallet. No intermediary, no revenue share, no waiting.

cards.title: Your site. Your language. Your niche.
cards.copy: Custom domain, logo, and colors. Create markets in any language and build around your local sports team, regional politics, or community events.

cards.title: Ask anything. Your audience decides.
cards.copy: You write the question — about anything you cover. Your audience bets yes or no. Every trade earns you a fee, straight to your wallet with no intermediary.
cards.question: "Will GTA 6 launch before July 2025?"

cards.title: Alive from day one. No empty market problem.
cards.copy: Shared liquidity via mirrored markets gives your market activity before the first visitor arrives. The cold start problem that kills most platforms doesn't exist here.

items.q: How long does it take, and do I need technical skills?
items.aHtml: Most markets go live in under 15 minutes. You launch from /launch with a guided setup — no code, no contract deployment, no DevOps. If you can set up a Shopify store, you can launch a Kuest market.

items.q: Can I show Polymarket markets on my site?
items.aHtml: Yes. You can mirror active markets from Polymarket — either all categories or only the ones relevant to your niche (crypto, sports, politics, etc.). These mirrored markets come with shared liquidity from day one, so your site feels live from the moment it's published.

items.q: Can I create my own markets? Who provides the liquidity?
items.aHtml: Yes. You can create custom markets around any question you choose. Mirrored Polymarket markets have shared liquidity built in. Markets you create yourself depend on your audience trading — so your own content and community drive the volume there. You can also opt into cross-market liquidity sharing for creator markets.

items.q: How do I make money, and can I set my own fees?
items.aHtml: You set a trading fee rate on your market — typically between 0.5% and 3%. Every time someone trades, that fee goes directly to your wallet. No revenue share, no intermediary, no waiting. You control the rate and can change it at any time.

items.q: Can I use my own domain and branding?
items.aHtml: Yes. You can launch with your own domain, logo, colors, and category structure so the market feels entirely native to your brand — not a Kuest white-label.

Kuest uses UMA-based resolution rails for transparent, verifiable settlement. The smart contracts are derived from Polymarket's — audited by OpenZeppelin — and adapted to support shared liquidity across markets. You don't need to understand any of this to use it, but it means the financial infrastructure under your market is the same stack that's processed billions in volume.

items.q: Is there a cost to launch?
items.aHtml: The launch flow is free to start. Production infrastructure pricing is usage-based — you pay when you scale, not before.

The codebase is open source under the Kuest MIT+Commons license. Forks for branding, frontend changes, and custom UX are welcome. Production deployments, however, must use Kuest infrastructure. Running an independent trading stack requires a separate commercial agreement.

finalCta.title: Your market, your audience, your rules.
finalCta.subtitle: Start free. No credit card required.
